content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-15) with demo credentials provided (fastlane/metadata/review_information/demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt), but notes.txt only contains "n/a" and does not explain how the reviewer reaches the subscription paywall/core features (App/PaywallView.swift).
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need explicit instructions to unlock gated functionality, especially since this app also has an in-app purchase paywall blocking core features (app blocking, schedules, reports). Credentials alone aren't enough — the reviewer may not know to expect or how to trigger the subscription flow, risking a 2.1/2.3.7 rejection for "unable to test." Replace the "n/a" note with steps describing login, navigating to the paywall, and how to test/verify the subscription (e.g., sandbox account behavior).
